description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands shirtless, wearing a menacing mask that covers the lower half of his face and head, with visible breathing apparatus details. He is equipped with a utility belt holding several red canisters and pouches, and wears rugged, dark jeans with reinforced knee pads and heavy-duty combat boots. In his right hand, he grips a long metal crowbar, while his left hand holds a small cylindrical object. The figure's posture is assertive and ready, with defined musculature and visible veins on his arms and back. The overall appearance suggests a tough, urban survivor or enforcer, prepared for physical confrontation. Accessories and attire evoke a utilitarian, post-apocalyptic or dystopian style.
description: A shirtless, muscular masked man with a utility belt, combat boots, and a crowbar, exuding a tough, urban survivor vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mask, muscular torso, utility belt with canisters, and crowbar held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mask profile, arm muscles, and the length of the crowbar.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the muscular back, belt details, and the back of the boots and jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the utility belt, pouches, and the crowbar's full length in the left hand.
attribute_clothing_type: utility belt with pouches and canisters, rugged jeans with knee pads, heavy-duty combat boots, full-face mask with breathing apparatus
